name: Sausage-Stuffed Zucchini
recipeIngredient: 1/2 Cup Fresh Corn Kernels, or Frozen Corn
4 Ounces Shredded Cheddar Cheese (1 cup), divided
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut each zucchini in half lengthwise and place the cut side down in a large skillet.
2. Add 1/2-inch of water to the skillet and bring it to a boil.
3. Reduce the heat, then simmer until the zucchini are crisp tender, about 5 minutes.
4. Remove the zucchini from the skillet and drain any excess water.
5. In the same skillet, cook the sausage, onion, and garlic until the sausage is browned.
6. Drain any fat that has separated from the mixture.
7. Add oregano, corn, and tomato to the skillet. Cook and stir until everything is heated through.
8. Remove from heat and stir in 2/3 cup of cheese. Set aside.
9. Scoop out and discard the seeds from each zucchini.
10. Divide the sausage mixture among the zucchini shells.
11. Place the stuffed zucchinis in a greased baking pan measuring 13-inch x 9-inch x 2-inch.
12. Sprinkle with the remaining cheese.
13. Bake uncovered at 375°F for 12-15 minutes, or until heated through.
Yield: 4 to 6 servings
